name: @marvinvista/pricebench
description: CLI that catches AI pricing margin leaks before they reach customers.

scripts.check: node --test && node bin/pricebench.js status --json && node bin/pricebench.js doctor --json && node scripts/verify-public-surface.js && node scripts/run-alpha-trial.js --json && node scripts/smoke-github-install.js && node scripts/outside-alpha-check.js
scripts.release:rc: node --test && node bin/pricebench.js status --json && node bin/pricebench.js doctor --json && node scripts/verify-public-surface.js && node scripts/run-alpha-trial.js --json && node scripts/smoke-github-install.js && node scripts/outside-alpha-check.js

author: Marvin Vista
